brand_entity.name: Pliability
brand_entity.one_line: Pliability is a mobility and recovery app that offers guided stretching and recovery programs tailored for athletes and fitness enthusiasts.

filtered_signals.title: Yoga-App für Hunde
filtered_signals.relevance_reason: The user discusses their daily 2-year habit using Pliability, highlighting features like program customization and ease of use.
verbatim_quotes: täglichen Dehnübungen (die ich 10-15 Minuten jeden Tag mit der App "Pliability" mache)
Bei Pliability erstellt man selbst sein Programm.
Was ich an der App gut finde (und warum ich sie seit fast 2 Jahren fast jeden Tag nutze) ist, dass ich jeden Morgen einfach "Play" drücke und es losgeht.

filtered_signals.title: Pliability Alternative
filtered_signals.relevance_reason: The user provides a detailed list of features they love about the app, including the library search, UI, and breath-focused routines.
verbatim_quotes: I absolutely love Pliability, but I can't afford it right now.
I appreciate alot of the things I love about it (library, search by body part/goal, personalised plans, nice UI, etc)
positive, breath focused, calming, varied, guided routines that run 15-30 minutes each that I got from Pliability.
